## Description

Please include a summary of the change, what problem it solves, and any relevant context. 

Fixes # (issue reference if applicable)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing & Verification

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. 

- [ ] **Python Syntax Check:** Checked with `python3 -m py_compile`
- [ ] **Sandbox Verification:** Tested executing isolated code in target languages
- [ ] **Security Scan:** Verified SAST rules block malicious patterns and allow safe code
- [ ] **Frontend Check:** Settings modal, sidebar, and connection status checked in browser

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (README/STARTUP/README_SETUP)
- [ ] My commits follow clean, structured commit messages
